meaning: n.(在牛津和达累姆大学)学生膳宿杂费帐目,校内各学杂费用
examples: But the Battels understand that their children may have questions.
I had started the term with my battels paid and over a hundred pounds in hand.
So they have prepared two sets of baby books: one outlining life with the Battels, the other about each child's birth parents.
